response.overview: It contains: the Leoncio Prado airplane after the accident in which pilot Simon and mechanic Wheeler were injured; a view of the injured mechanic; Mr. Cipriano Laos aboard the Ebro; Mr. Percy Batchelor en route to England; the American ambassador to Peru; the secretary of the United States Embassy who is about to travel to his country; President Leguía at the races on May 2nd; Goya and the Mona Lisa at the races.
response.title: Revista semanal de Inca Film 2
